calendar.matters:
Motion Under Ccp 473 For Relief From Judgment Regarding Attorney'S Fee
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion under CCP 473 for relief from judgment and to includes an award of Attorneys' Fees in the post judgment granted on May 10, 20078 Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Robert Reesner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Assoc. Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
After hearing the motion and considering of the moving papers, Plaintiff's Motion is granted.
Order signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Under Ccp 473 For Relief From Judgment And Clarifying That Judgment Includes An Award Of Attorneys' Fees,
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Ccp 1717, Ccp 1032, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion for Award of Attorney's Fees Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Robert Resner, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No opposition made in court.
After hearing the motion and considering of the evidence presented, Plaintiff's Motion is denied.
Counsel to prepare an Order for signature.
Aug. 2, 2007
Order Denying Motion for Award of Attorney's Fess signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-24-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Continued To Jun-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Paxton.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Pam Frese was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1 - Invoices------------------------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Ramcon Company, Inc., a California Corp.; Michael B. Smith individually as guarantor of Ramcon Compnay, Inc., and Dawn F. Smith, aka Dawn Francine Kreiss individually as guarantor of Ramcon Compnay, Inc. as follows:
Damages $125,661.89
Prejudgment Interest $9,977.40
Costs 532.50 for a total of $136,171.79
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.

Appearance:
